---
title: "Hello, welcome to my website!"
---

<br>

```{r out.width = "50%", fig.align = "center", echo = FALSE}
#knitr::include_graphics("Picture_LR.jpg")
```

<br>

Hi! I am Emily Roberts. I am a PhD candidate at the [Department of Biostatistics, University of Michigan](https://sph.umich.edu/biostat/). I am interested in statistical methodology that can be applied in a cancer setting. Welcome to my page where I have included a bit about myself and my work.

I graduated Summa Cum Laude in 2016 from Coe College with a BA in mathematics and psychology as a member of Phi Beta Kappa National Honor Society. Additionally, I earned my MS in biostatistics from Michigan in 2018. My passion for medical research and ultimate career goals stem from my diagnosis of type I diabetes at the age of four.
